description: CompositionBeige mandarin collar kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, and embroidery along the slit neckline with buttons, and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careUse mild detergentDo not dry in direct sunlightDo not iron directly on print/embroideryUse warm ironDiscreet that this vishudh kurta may be, it adds abundant glamour to your personality when you pair it with chunky accessories and a white churidar or leggings. Keep the neck simple to draw maximum attention to the beautiful embroidery and stack bangles on your wrist to balance it out. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"
